016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import androidx.room.Dao;
020import androidx.room.Delete;
021import androidx.room.Insert;
022import androidx.room.Query;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity.ExportHistory;
024import java.util.Collection;
025import java.util.List;
026
027/**
028 * Data Access Object (DAO) interface for {@link ExportHistory} entity. Declares CRUD operations
029 * for managing export history records. Note: Export records are generally immutable once created,
030 * so no update operations are provided.
031 */
032@Dao
033public interface ExportHistoryDao {
034
035  /**
036   * Inserts a single export history record into the database.
037   *
038   * @param exportHistory ExportHistory instance to insert.
039   * @return ID of the newly inserted export record.
040   */
041  @Insert
042  long insert(ExportHistory exportHistory);
043
044  /**
045   * Inserts multiple export history records into the database.
046   *
047   * @param exportHistories Collection of export records to insert.
048   * @return List of IDs of the newly inserted export records.
049   */
050  @Insert
051  List<Long> insert(Collection<ExportHistory> exportHistories);
052
053  /**
054   * Inserts multiple export history records into the database.
055   *
056   * @param exportHistories Variable number of export records to insert.
057   * @return List of IDs of the newly inserted export records.
058   */
059  @Insert
060  List<Long> insert(ExportHistory... exportHistories);
061
062  /**
063   * Deletes an export history record from the database.
064   *
065   * @param exportHistory ExportHistory instance to delete.
066   * @return Number of rows deleted.
067   */
068  @Delete
069  int delete(ExportHistory exportHistory);
070
071  /**
072   * Deletes multiple export history records from the database.
073   *
074   * @param exportHistories Variable number of export records to delete.
075   * @return Number of rows deleted.
076   */
077  @Delete
078  int delete(ExportHistory... exportHistories);
079
080  /**
081   * Retrieves an export history record by its ID.
082   *
083   * @param exportHistoryId Export history ID.
084   * @return LiveData containing the export record, or {@code null} if not found.
085   */
086  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history WHERE export_history_id = :exportHistoryId")
087  LiveData<ExportHistory> select(long exportHistoryId);
088
089  /**
090   * Retrieves all export history records for a specific project, ordered by export time (most recent first).
091   *
092   * @param projectId Project ID.
093   * @return LiveData containing a list of export records for the specified project.
094   */
095  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId ORDER BY exported_at DESC")
096  LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectByProject(long projectId);
097
098  /**
099   * Retrieves the most recent export record for a specific project.
100   *
101   * @param projectId Project ID.
102   * @return LiveData containing the most recent export record, or {@code null} if none exist.
103   */
104  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId ORDER BY exported_at DESC LIMIT 1")
105  LiveData<ExportHistory> selectMostRecent(long projectId);
106
107  /**
108   * Retrieves export history records for a specific project and file format.
109   *
110   * @param projectId Project ID.
111   * @param fileFormat File format (e.g., "PNG", "JPG").
112   * @return LiveData containing a list of export records with the specified format.
113   */
114  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId AND file_format = :fileFormat ORDER BY exported_at DESC")
115  LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectByFormat(long projectId, String fileFormat);
116
117  /**
118   * Retrieves export history records for a specific project and resolution.
119   *
120   * @param projectId Project ID.
121   * @param resolution Resolution value.
122   * @return LiveData containing a list of export records with the specified resolution.
123   */
124  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId AND resolution = :resolution ORDER BY exported_at DESC")
125  LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectByResolution(long projectId, int resolution);
126
127  /**
128   * Gets the count of export records for a specific project.
129   *
130   * @param projectId Project ID.
131   * @return LiveData containing the number of export records for the project.
132   */
133  @Query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId")
134  LiveData<Integer> countByProject(long projectId);
135
136  /**
137   * Gets the total storage size (in bytes) used by exports for a specific project.
138   *
139   * @param projectId Project ID.
140   * @return LiveData containing the total file size in bytes.
141   */
142  @Query("SELECT SUM(file_size_bytes) FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId")
143  LiveData<Long> getTotalSizeByProject(long projectId);
144
145  /**
146   * Retrieves all export history records across all projects, ordered by export time (most recent first).
147   *
148   * @return LiveData containing a list of all export records.
149   */
150  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history ORDER BY exported_at DESC")
151  LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectAll();
152
153  /**
154   * Retrieves a limited number of recent export records across all projects.
155   *
156   * @param limit Maximum number of records to retrieve.
157   * @return LiveData containing a list of recent export records.
158   */
159  @Query("SELECT * FROM export_history ORDER BY exported_at DESC LIMIT :limit")
160  LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectRecent(int limit);
161
162  /**
163   * Deletes all export history records for a specific project.
164   *
165   * @param projectId Project ID.
166   * @return Number of rows deleted.
167   */
168  @Query("DELETE FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId")
169  int deleteByProject(long projectId);
170
171  /**
172   * Deletes export history records older than a specific export record.
173   *
174   * @param projectId Project ID.
175   * @param exportHistoryId Export history ID threshold (records older than this will be deleted).
176   * @return Number of rows deleted.
177   */
178  @Query("DELETE FROM export_history WHERE project_id = :projectId AND export_history_id < :exportHistoryId")
179  int deleteOlderThan(long projectId, long exportHistoryId);
180}
